The Playbook · User Guide

SLIMEWIRE

🐸 trade · automate · launch 🧌

Everything you need to run SlimeWire like a pro — trade with one-tap presets, let your A.I. agent buy and sell for you, use every tool, launch a coin, and rally raids on X & Telegram. Built for degens. Easy for newbies.

Download the Playbook⬇ SAVE AS PDF · ALWAYS THE LATEST
Opens your print dialog → choose “Save as PDF”.

SlimeWire is a fast Solana memecoin terminal with a personal A.I. trading agent on top. Scan and trade live coins by hand, or hand the wheel to Pro Autopilot and let it do the buying and selling for you. Launch your own coin, build prelaunch hype, and rally your crew on X & Telegram. This playbook shows you exactly how to use all of it.

🗺️ The map

  1. Get in (30 sec)
  2. The terminal & every tab
  3. How to trade
  4. Quick-trade presets
  5. Pro tools: Bundle, Snipe, SlimeBot, A.I.
  6. Pro Autopilot (your A.I. agent)
  7. SlimeShield safety
  8. Launch a coin
  9. Prelaunch hype
  10. Raid board (X & TG)
  11. Telegram bot
  12. Flex on X
  13. Tips & FAQ
1

Get In — 30 Seconds

Open slimewire.org. Three doors:

Connect Wallet — tap it, pick Phantom or Solflare, approve. Now you can trade with your own wallet.
Create Account — sign up with email to save presets, referral code and managed wallets across devices.
Browse Terminal — poke around with no login. Scan coins and learn the layout before connecting anything.
New here? Hit Browse Terminal and scan a few coins to get the feel. Connect a wallet only when you're ready to actually buy.
2

The Terminal & Every Tab

The menu groups everything. Open a group, pick a tool. Here's where it all lives:

🖥️ Live

Live Terminal
Your home base — fresh pairs, best picks, KOL signals and quick trades in one screen.
Cooks
Fresh + trending pairs cooking right now.
Live Trades
Live buy/sell flow as it happens.

Using the Live Terminal

This is the screen you'll live on. Brand-new pairs stream in the second they launch, and the category tabs let you slice the market however you want:

Pick a category at the top — Fresh Pairs (newest launches, live by the second), Best Picks (top-scored), High Volume, Biggest Gainers, High Liquidity or Most Active. Each pulls its own ranked list and refreshes itself.
Read a row — each coin shows price, market cap, age, volume and buy/sell pressure at a glance, with a SlimeShield safety read (§7).
Tap any coin to open it — its chart, links, transactions and a buy panel load instantly. Or paste a contract address (CA) in search to jump straight to one.
Trade it right there with Quick Buy, or ★ save it to your Watchlist to track for later.
Tip: use Fresh Pairs to catch brand-new launches, then flip to Biggest Gainers / High Volume to see what's actually moving with real money behind it.

💱 Swap & Chart

Slime Swap
The full buy/sell panel with presets — your main trade desk.
Smart Chart
Any token's chart, links, transactions and trading context.

📡 Intel

Slime Scope
Fresh, graduating & graduated pump movement.
Watchlist
Coins you saved to track.
KOL Tracker
Watch KOL wallets & copy-trade candidates.
OgreSniper
Auto-scanner that surfaces the best fresh setups by mode.
TP/SL Audit
See every take-profit / stop-loss exit the engine has fired.

🧌 Ogre Tek

Tek Hub
The automation deck — every pro tool in one place.
Ogre A.I.
Pick a category, scan setups, ape the best one and arm exits — you stay in the loop.
Pump Launch
Launch your own coin on pump.fun (see §8).
Prelaunch
Build hype with a countdown + allowlist before you drop (see §9).
Raid Board
Rally your X/TG crew to raid a post (see §10).
Bundle
Buy/sell the same coin across several wallets at once.
SlimeBot
The volume configurator — lifelike buy/sell activity on a token.
Launch Watch
Watch a launch and snipe it the instant it's live.

💼 Portfolio & You

Wallets / Balances
Balances, managed wallets, funding, sweep, restore.
Positions
Your open holdings + manual exit controls.
PnL
Realized + historical profit/loss cards.
Home / Profile
Account: profile pic, X handle, referral code, saved settings & presets.
👑 Pro
Pro Autopilot — your A.I. agent that trades for you (see §6). The gold pill in the bar.
3

How To Trade

Two ways to buy: Quick Buy (fastest) and Slime Swap (full control).

⚡ Quick Buy — the fast lane

Find a coin — tap one in any feed, or paste its contract address (CA) in the search.
Tap Quick Buy. A little panel opens.
Type how much SOL to spend (e.g. 0.10) — or tap a size preset.
Hit Buy & approve. Your fill lands in Positions. Done.

🟢 Slime Swap — full control

Open Slime Swap (or tap a coin → it loads there).
Paste the token CA (or it's already filled from the coin you tapped).
Pick the wallet to trade from, set your amount and slippage.
Tap Buy → approve. To sell later, use the sell % presets.

💸 Selling & exiting

Go to Positions — every open bag is listed with live PnL.
Tap a position and choose a sell %: 25% 50% 100% or custom.
Or set an auto-exit (Take Profit / Stop Loss) so it sells for you — see presets.
Golden rule: memecoins are high-risk. Only spend what you can afford to lose, and check the SlimeShield read before you ape.
4

Quick-Trade Presets

Presets are one-tap settings so you trade fast without typing every time. Set defaults in Home / Profile; tweak per-trade in the panel.

💰 Buy Size 0.1 SOL 0.25 0.5 custom

How much SOL a one-tap buy spends.

🌀 Slippage 3% 4% 5% custom bps

How much price movement you'll accept on the fill. Fresh/volatile coins need more. Custom is in bps: 100 bps = 1%, so 500 = 5%.

📤 Sell % 25% 50% 100% custom

How much of a bag to dump in one tap. Use 25–50% to take profit and ride the rest.

🎯 Take Profit +25% +60% +100% +250%

Auto-sell when it pumps to your target. Custom accepts a % like 500 or a multiple like 5x.

🛑 Stop Loss off -8% -10% -15%

Auto-sell to cut a loser. Set it when you open a position so you don't round-trip a rug.

⏱️ Fallback Sell timer

Auto-sells after a set time if neither TP nor SL hits — so nothing sits forgotten.

⚙️ Priority Fee

Pay a little extra for faster confirmation when the chain is busy / on snipes.

Newbie defaults that just work: Buy 0.1 SOL · Slippage 4% · Take Profit +60% · Stop Loss -10%. Set presets once and every managed buy inherits them — your exits arm automatically.
5

Pro Tools (Ogre Tek)

Ogre Tek is the heavy machinery — bundling, sniping, the SlimeBot volume engine, and Ogre A.I. picks. Same presets apply. Everything here spends real SOL — start small.

📦 Bundle — many wallets, one tap

Buy or sell the same token across several of your wallets at once — perfect for spreading a launch buy or exiting together.

Paste the Token CA and tick the wallets to include.
Set Buy Per Wallet and a Sell %, plus Slippage.
Tap Bundle Buy / Bundle Sell. Optionally add a TP/SL plan that applies to every wallet.

🎯 Snipe — buy the instant it's live

Open Launch Watch, set the target launch or condition.
Pre-set size, slippage and a priority fee (pay for speed).
Arm it — the buy fires automatically the moment the coin goes live.

🤖 SlimeBot — the volume configurator

SlimeBot generates lifelike trading volume on a token using a rotating set of wallets. Set the CA, investment (SOL budget), duration, mode (Smart = a fresh wallet each round / Spam = denser), aggressiveness and a stagger pattern. Toggle Leave dust (each wallet keeps 1 token, reads as a holder) and Offset sell (a different wallet sells behind each buy) for the most natural look. Tap Start, then Stop & Sweep Back when done.

🧠 Ogre A.I. — co-pilot picks

Pick a category, and Ogre A.I. scans live setups, apes the best one for your managed wallets, and arms your exits — you stay in the loop. Want it fully hands-off? That's Pro Autopilot below.

Real money: Bundle, Snipe and SlimeBot all spend real SOL across many trades; fees add up. Start with a small budget and short duration.
6

Pro Autopilot — Your A.I. Agent

Pro is your personal A.I. trading agent. Turn it on and it does the buying and selling for you — scanning the market, taking entries, taking profit and cutting losers automatically, on your own wallet, around the clock.

👑 Pro Autopilot

The gold pill in the nav. Your A.I. agent that trades hands-free with the hard limits you set.

Tap the gold 👑 Pro pill in the nav (or go to /pro).
Unlock access, then connect the wallet you want it to trade on.
Set how much it can use and a style, then tap Start. That's it — it trades for you.
Watch it live: equity, PnL and every position update on the dashboard. Stop anytime.
Set-and-forget. Pro runs on your wallet with hard limits you set. It's an agent, not a promise — memecoins are risky, so start with an amount you're comfortable handing it.
7

SlimeShield Safety

Every token gets a quick SlimeShield read — a plain verdict (safe / risk / avoid) with the reasons: liquidity, momentum, sell pressure and common rug patterns. You'll see it on token pages and any time you paste a CA. It's a helper, not a guarantee — your call always.

8

Launch A Coin (Pump.fun)

Launch your coin on pump.fun from Ogre Tek → Pump Launch (or the Telegram bot). Fill the sheet, set a dev buy, and fire.

📝 The launch sheet

🏷️ Name & Symbol

Your coin's name and ticker ($SYMBOL).

🖼️ Image & Description

The picture and blurb — what people see first.

🔗 Socials

Website, X and Telegram links shown on the coin.

💵 Dev Buy

Buy a SOL amount at launch — your own opening position so you're not buying at zero.

⚙️ Creator Fees

Fee mode + creator-fee % and the wallet that receives them; option to burn or route to a buyback wallet.

🚀 The flow

Fill the sheet and set your Dev Buy + fee handling.
Tap Launch on Pump — SlimeWire mints it and hands you the live CA.
Drop that CA into the Bundle panel to spread an opening buy across your wallets.
Rally the Raid Board (§10) and fire TG alerts + X scan cards.
Tip: run a Prelaunch (§9) first to gather a crew before you drop, so there are buyers waiting.
9

Prelaunch Hype

Open slimewire.org/prelaunch. Build the buzz before a coin launches.

  • Countdown to launch + a hype meter that fills as the crew piles in.
  • Allowlist spots — supporters claim a spot so they're ready at launch.
  • Social tasks — follow X, join Telegram, share — each adds hype.
  • Referral leaderboard — your link climbs the board as people join through it.
  • List yours — add your project to the cauldron and share the link.
10

Raid Board (X & Telegram)

Open slimewire.org/raids. The crew raids together — a post becomes a boss and its slime gauge fills with real likes + retweets.

  • Start a raid in Telegram: /raid <X post> [$TICKER] [target] — your post lands on the board.
  • RAID NOW — opens the X post so the swamp can like + retweet and fill the gauge.
  • Share to X / Telegram — one tap rallies more raiders; the leaderboard ranks top raiders.
  • Put your coin on the board — paste any CA to add it as a boss coin for the crew to ape.
11

Telegram Bot

DM the bot, or add it to your group and have an admin run /slimewire on for live alerts. Commands:

/start
Open the menu / link your account.
/look <CA>
A full scan card — stats, safety, socials + who first called it. (Just pasting a CA does it.)
$TICKER
Type a cashtag (e.g. $OGRE) for the same scan card.
/alpha
Current best picks / trending.
/raid <X link>
Put your post on the raid board (ranked by likes + RTs).
/chart <ticker|CA>
A chart for any coin or crypto ticker (btc, eth, sol…).
/flex <CA>
Post your win/loss card right in the chat.
/proof
Public engine track record — wins AND losses.
12

Flex On X

SlimeWire turns your moves into shareable content — every share carries the site back to X:

  • PnL / Flex cards — one tap posts your win (or loss) card with the CA + links.
  • Raid posts — fire a raid from Telegram and rally your crew on the board.
  • Prelaunch referral link — share it and climb the referrer leaderboard.
13

Tips & FAQ

Do I need a wallet to look around?

No. Scanning coins and reading every page is free with no login. A wallet is only for buying, selling or launching.

What slippage should I use?

Start at 4%. Bump to 5–10% on brand-new/volatile coins if buys fail. Custom is in bps (500 = 5%).

How do I take profit automatically?

Set a Take Profit preset (e.g. +60% or 5x) and a Stop Loss (e.g. -10%) when you open the trade — or let Pro Autopilot handle exits for you.

What's the difference between Ogre A.I. and Pro?

Ogre A.I. apes the best pick and arms exits while you stay in the loop. Pro is fully hands-off — your A.I. agent buys and sells for you (§6).

The loop: scan a coin → ape it (or let Pro do it) → take profit → flex your /flex card → rally a /raid. Repeat. 🐸🔥
🐸 SlimeWire · slimewire.org · The Playbook · Trade by hand or let your A.I. agent do it. 🧌
